# WHAT: Agent Resume — What Agents Can Do

## Top-Level Outcome
Audience can identify an agent's three core capabilities in under 5 seconds.

## Narrative Fit
Section 2, slide 3. Follows the "why agents matter" hook and precedes the "how we built them" reveal.

## Slide Type
information

## L1/L2 Outcome Hierarchy

### L1 (Primary — visually prominent)
- Three core agent capabilities: reason, act, remember

### L2 (Supporting — present but secondary)
- Capabilities are composable
- Capabilities are personalizable per user

## Resources
- Existing capabilities taxonomy: `docs/specs/agent-capabilities.md`
- Voice guide: `docs/style/writing-tone.md`

## Verification Criteria
- Viewer can identify the 3 capabilities within 5 seconds
- L1 items are visually dominant (larger typography, higher contrast)
- L2 items are present but clearly secondary
- No GPT-isms in slide copy
- Slide title is an assertion (not a topic label)
